title: Extend command_bead_show() with --field PATH projection
description: Extend command_bead_show() in src/agent_takt/cli/commands/bead.py to support --field PATH. When args.field is set: (1) serialize the bead to a plain dict (via model_dump or equivalent); (2) implement a path resolver that splits on '.' while respecting bracket-style array indexing — parse segments like 'execution_history[-1]' into key + integer index, supporting negative indices; (3) traverse the dict/list structure; (4) on successful traversal call format_bead_field(value) and print, exiting zero (None and empty-string values output a bare newline and exit zero — legitimate unset field); (5) if a key is absent exit non-zero printing to stderr 'field not found: <path>'; (6) if an array index is out of range exit non-zero printing to stderr 'field not found: <path> (length N)'. When args.field is absent, behavior is identical to current full-JSON output.
acceptance_criteria: takt bead show <id> --field status returns the status string with no surrounding quotes
takt bead show <id> --field handoff_summary.completed returns the nested string value
takt bead show <id> --field execution_history[-1].event returns the last entry's event field
takt bead show <id> --field nonexistent.key exits non-zero with stderr 'field not found: nonexistent.key' and no stdout
takt bead show <id> --field expected_files[99] on a 3-element list exits non-zero with stderr containing '(length 3)'
takt bead show <id> --field lease on a non-leased bead exits zero and outputs a blank line
takt bead show <id> --field handoff_summary.requires_followup returns lowercase 'true' or 'false'
takt bead show <id> with no --field returns full JSON identical to current behavior
